title: cleidion velutinum
intro: Cleidion velutinum, also known as velvet cleidion, is a flowering plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Cleidion velutinum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Cleidion velutinum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
